tasks.description: Implement Server-Sent Events endpoint in Node.js server to push refresh notifications when SVG files change.

steps.description: Add /events SSE endpoint with proper headers and keep-alive mechanism
Implement file watcher using fs.watch to monitor /tmp/plantuml.nvim directory
Broadcast refresh event to all connected SSE clients when SVG file changes
Handle client disconnect and cleanup stale connections

tasks.acceptance-criteria: SSE endpoint /events returns Content-Type: text/event-stream. Server maintains list of connected clients. File changes in /tmp/plantuml.nvim trigger SSE event with data: refresh. Disconnected clients are properly cleaned up. PlantumlCreateSVG and PlantumlCreatePNG are NOT affected.

unit: SSE endpoint returns correct headers (Content-Type: text/event-stream, Cache-Control: no-cache, Connection: keep-alive)
Client connection is added to clients list on connect
Client connection is removed from clients list on disconnect
File watcher callback sends refresh event to all connected clients with correct SSE format
integration: curl to /events receives keep-alive comments and refresh events when SVG file is modified in /tmp/plantuml.nvim
Multiple concurrent clients all receive refresh events
e2e-manual: Open browser to SSE endpoint, modify SVG file in /tmp/plantuml.nvim, verify browser receives refresh event

tasks.task: Inject SSE listener script into preview SVG
tasks.description: Inject auto-refresh script into SVG files ONLY for PlantumlPreview, not for PlantumlCreateSVG or PlantumlCreatePNG.

steps.description: Create inject_script() helper function in preview.lua that adds EventSource listener
Call inject_script() in preview_svg() AFTER executor.run_plantuml() callback, only for preview output
Verify PlantumlCreateSVG and PlantumlCreatePNG do NOT receive script injection

tasks.acceptance-criteria: SVG files in /tmp/plantuml.nvim/ contain auto-refresh script. SVG files in project-folder/umlout/ do NOT contain any injected script. executor.lua remains unmodified to avoid side effects on CreateSVG and CreatePNG.

unit: inject_script() function returns valid SVG string with <script> element
Script contains EventSource connection to correct /events endpoint
Script contains location.reload() call in onmessage handler
Injection handles SVG string with xml declaration correctly
Original SVG attributes (viewBox, width, height, etc.) are preserved after injection
integration: PlantumlPreview generates SVG with injected script in /tmp/plantuml.nvim/
PlantumlCreateSVG generates clean SVG without script in project-folder/umlout/svg/
PlantumlCreatePNG generates clean SVG and PNG without script in project-folder/umlout/
e2e-manual: Open PlantumlPreview SVG in browser, verify no console errors from injected script
Run PlantumlCreateSVG, open output file, verify no injected script present

tasks.task: Add BufWritePost autocommand for SVG preview auto-refresh
tasks.description: Register BufWritePost autocommand to regenerate SVG and trigger browser refresh when user saves .puml or .uml buffer during active SVG preview.

steps.description: Track SVG preview state (active/inactive) in preview.lua module
Create register_svg_autocmd() function for BufWritePost on .puml/.uml files
Autocmd handler regenerates preview SVG in /tmp/plantuml.nvim/, not project output
Clean up autocmd when preview is stopped or buffer is closed

tasks.acceptance-criteria: BufWritePost autocommand is registered when SVG preview starts. Saving .puml or .uml file triggers preview SVG regeneration in /tmp/plantuml.nvim/. Autocommand is cleaned up when preview stops. PlantumlCreateSVG/PNG/UTXT are NOT triggered by the autocommand.

unit: register_svg_autocmd() creates exactly one BufWritePost autocommand with correct pattern (*.puml,*.uml)
Autocmd is stored and can be cleared by augroup name
Preview state flag toggles correctly on start/stop
integration: Calling preview_svg() registers the autocmd and sets preview state to active
BufWritePost event triggers SVG regeneration in /tmp/plantuml.nvim/ when preview is active
BufWritePost event does NOT trigger regeneration when preview is inactive
BufWritePost event does NOT trigger PlantumlCreateSVG/PNG/UTXT functions
Closing preview window clears the autocmd and preview state
e2e-manual: Run :PlantumlPreview, edit and save .puml file, verify browser auto-refreshes with updated diagram
